tasks.label: Build dist (build + twine check)
args: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist, build -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m twine check dist\*

tasks.label: Upload TestPyPI (requires TWINE_PASSWORD)
args: if (-not $env:TWINE_PASSWORD) { throw 'Set TWINE_PASSWORD to your TestPyPI API token (do not paste it into chat). Example: $env:TWINE_PASSWORD="pypi-..."' }; $env:TWINE_USERNAME='__token__'; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m twine upload -r testpypi dist\*

tasks.label: Upload PyPI (requires TWINE_PASSWORD)
args: if (-not $env:TWINE_PASSWORD) { throw 'Set TWINE_PASSWORD to your PyPI API token (do not paste it into chat). Example: $env:TWINE_PASSWORD="pypi-..."' }; $env:TWINE_USERNAME='__token__'; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m twine upload dist\*
